inputs.shares_source: Q1 2026 weighted average diluted shares 319.708M (10-Q Q1 2026)
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $113.9M minus capital spending on property and equipment $56.8M = $57.2M owner cash, divided by 227.4M FY2025 diluted shares (10-K FY2025 cash flow statement)
inputs.revenue_fy2025_source: FY2025 total revenue $2,024.0M (+37.3% YoY): product $1,531.3M, installation $204.1M, service $228.3M, electricity $60.4M (10-K FY2025 revenue disaggregation)
inputs.revenue_q1_source: Q1 2026 total revenue $751.1M (+130.4% YoY) per 10-Q Q1 2026
inputs.cash_source: Cash and equivalents $2,491.4M at March 31, 2026 (10-Q Q1 2026)
inputs.debt_source: Long-term recourse debt $2,598.7M at March 31, 2026 excluding current maturities (10-Q Q1 2026)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base uses FY2025 filing-based owner cash, not Q1 2026 run-rate. Q1 2026 operating cash flow was $73.6M on a single quarter of AI datacenter-heavy product revenue; annualizing would overstate durability until backlog converts and margins repeat for four quarters.

segments.label: Energy Server product (solid oxide fuel cell systems)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: FY2025 consolidated owner cash $57.2M allocated 75.6% by product revenue share (10-K revenue table)
segments.notes: Q1 2026 product revenue +208% YoY on datacenter demand; growth row cites filing trend with [Assumption] on sustainability

segments.label: Installation and deployment services
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: FY2025 consolidated owner cash allocated 10.1% by installation revenue share
segments.notes: Follows product ship cycle; Q1 2026 installation revenue declined 22.9% YoY as mix shifted to larger product blocks

segments.label: Service and electricity (installed-base recurring)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: FY2025 consolidated owner cash allocated 14.3% by service + electricity revenue ($228.3M + $60.4M)
segments.notes: Service revenue +6.9% FY2025; ~682 MW installed base in South Korea per 10-K; recurring take-or-pay and service contracts

options.label: Bloom Electrolyzer / hydrogen platform
options.base_terminal_rationale: Electrolyzer revenue not separately broken out in FY2025 table; pre-scale option sized at zero in Lawrence base until disclosed revenue line exceeds 5% of total
options.evidence: 10-K Item 1: unified platform serves power and hydrogen markets; Electrolyzer VIE referenced in XBRL

options.label: AI datacenter behind-the-meter power backlog
options.base_terminal_rationale: Q1 2026 product surge embedded in product segment growth 18% years 1-5, not double-counted
options.evidence: 10-K risk factors cite AI data center market; Q1 2026 product revenue $653.3M (+208% YoY) per 10-Q

options.label: Convertible notes / equity-linked financing (2025-2026)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Shares outstanding rose to ~280.5M vs 227.4M FY2025 diluted average; Q1 2026 diluted 319.7M; induced conversion expense $66.2M FY2025
options.evidence: 10-K FY2025: financing cash inflow $1,508M; induced conversion expense; EntityCommonStockSharesOutstanding 280,548,215

corporate_drag.notes: Recourse debt ~$2.6B vs equity ~$769M FY2025; interest and convert accounting; SK Korea partnership concentration

bear.notes: Datacenter orders defer; natural gas or grid power cheaper; convert dilution continues; margin compression

base.notes: Product mix stays elevated vs FY2025 but not full Q1 run-rate; service base grows with installed MW

bull.notes: AI power bottleneck persists; electrolyzer wins utility hydrogen bids; operating margin expands toward mid-teens

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: PP&E and lease assets at cost; no land-at-zero pattern (10-K balance sheet)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: Manufacturing in California and Delaware; deployed Energy Servers are revenue-producing

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Consolidated operating income positive FY2025 $72.8M and Q1 2026 $72.2M (10-K, 10-Q)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Deferred revenue and customer deposits $101M current + $43M noncurrent FY2025; Q1 2026 deferred revenue $194M current (10-K, 10-Q)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Equity method investments $10.0M FY2025; SK joint ventures — immaterial to base IRR

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No royalty-trust or litigation recovery pattern

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Electrolyzer and AI datacenter power modeled inside product segment growth, not separate terminal

growth_explanation.mechanism: AI datacenter behind-the-meter power demand plus South Korea utility partnerships drive product revenue; service grows with installed MW base
growth_explanation.filing_citation: 10-K FY2025 revenue disaggregation; Q1 2026 10-Q +130% total revenue
growth_explanation.stress_test: If Q1 2026 product spike is one-quarter heroics, normalized owner cash stays near FY2025 $0.25/sh and price at $222 implies severe overvaluation
